name: Tier 3 availability heatmap renders on dashboard sidebar
description: Logged-in user sees the Availability heatmap panel with a day-by-hour color grid and a free-percentage badge in the dashboard sidebar

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Wait for 5 seconds for the dashboard to load
Scroll to the Availability panel in the right sidebar below Weekly Insights
Wait for 3 seconds for the availability heatmap grid to finish loading
Verify the Availability panel heading and a percentage-free badge are visible in the right sidebar
Verify the Availability panel shows a day-by-hour color grid with weekday column labels and a busy-to-free legend row beneath the grid
